title: selaginella exilis
intro: Selaginella exilis, also known as the "Desert Spikemoss," is a type of small, epiphytic plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, and it is believed to have medicinal properties such as wound healing, skin care, and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Selaginella exilis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve skin health, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a valuable herb for overall wellness. Selaginella exilis is often prepared as a herbal tea or powder, and it can also be used in topical creams and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
